'''鈭歜-d-w''' ('''kabadaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quickset|quickset]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quickset|quickset]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-d-w
|-
! Lemma
| kabadaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibadaw|thibadaw]] || [[word:jibadaw|jibadaw]] || [[word:shibadaw|shibadaw]] || [[word:kibadaw|kibadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubadaw|thuthubadaw]] || [[word:jujubadaw|jujubadaw]] || [[word:shushubadaw|shushubadaw]] || [[word:kukubadaw|kukubadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubadaw|thubadaw]] || [[word:jubadaw|jubadaw]] || [[word:shubadaw|shubadaw]] || [[word:kubadaw|kubadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubadaw|thubadaw]] || [[word:jubadaw|jubadaw]] || [[word:shubadaw|shubadaw]] || [[word:kubadaw|kubadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebadaw|thebadaw]] || [[word:jebadaw|jebadaw]] || [[word:shebadaw|shebadaw]] || [[word:kebadaw|kebadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobadaw|thothobadaw]] || [[word:jojobadaw|jojobadaw]] || [[word:shoshobadaw|shoshobadaw]] || [[word:kokobadaw|kokobadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobadaw|thobadaw]] || [[word:jobadaw|jobadaw]] || [[word:shobadaw|shobadaw]] || [[word:kobadaw|kobadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadaw|thobadaw]] || [[word:jobadaw|jobadaw]] || [[word:shobadaw|shobadaw]] || [[word:kobadaw|kobadaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]] || [[word:badaw|badaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙badaw|th忙badaw]] || [[word:j忙badaw|j忙badaw]] || [[word:sh忙badaw|sh忙badaw]] || [[word:k忙badaw|k忙badaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabadaw|thathabadaw]] || [[word:jajabadaw|jajabadaw]] || [[word:shashabadaw|shashabadaw]] || [[word:kakabadaw|kakabadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabadaw|thabadaw]] || [[word:jabadaw|jabadaw]] || [[word:shabadaw|shabadaw]] || [[word:kabadaw|kabadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabadaw|thabadaw]] || [[word:jabadaw|jabadaw]] || [[word:shabadaw|shabadaw]] || [[word:kabadaw|kabadaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabadaw|shabadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabadaw|goshabadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabadaw|gokishabadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabadawn眉|shabadawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabadawnkn眉|goshabadawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadawn眉|gokishabadawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabadawsh毛|shabadawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabadawnksh毛|goshabadawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabadawsh毛|gokishabadawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadawro|shabadawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadawnkro|goshabadawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadawro|gokishabadawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadawmu|shabadawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadawnkmu|goshabadawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadawmu|gokishabadawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabadawsher|shabadawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabadawnksher|goshabadawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabadawsher|gokishabadawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabadawng|shabadawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabadawnkng|goshabadawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabadawng|gokishabadawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabadawya|shabadawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabadawnkya|goshabadawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabadawya|gokishabadawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabadawyam|shabadawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabadawnkyam|goshabadawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabadawyam|gokishabadawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabadawn眉sh毛|shabadawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabadawnkn眉sh毛|goshabadawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabadawn眉sh毛|gokishabadawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadawn眉ro|shabadawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadawnkn眉ro|goshabadawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadawn眉ro|gokishabadawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadawn眉mu|shabadawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadawnkn眉mu|goshabadawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadawn眉mu|gokishabadawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabadawsh毛n眉|shabadawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabadawnksh毛n眉|goshabadawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadawsh毛n眉|gokishabadawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadawsh毛ro|shabadawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadawnksh毛ro|goshabadawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadawsh毛ro|gokishabadawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadawsh毛mu|shabadawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadawnksh毛mu|goshabadawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadawsh毛mu|gokishabadawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabadawron眉|shabadawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabadawnkron眉|goshabadawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadawron眉|gokishabadawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabadawrosh毛|shabadawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabadawnkrosh毛|goshabadawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabadawrosh毛|gokishabadawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabadawromu|shabadawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabadawnkromu|goshabadawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabadawromu|gokishabadawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabadawmun眉|shabadawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabadawnkmun眉|goshabadawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabadawmun眉|gokishabadawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabadawmush毛|shabadawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabadawnkmush毛|goshabadawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabadawmush毛|gokishabadawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabadawmuro|shabadawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabadawnkmuro|goshabadawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabadawmuro|gokishabadawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
